name: ᚱ Raidho
summary: Right order, journey, rhythm of the road
flowText: Raidho is the law of motion — the road knows the temple it leads to.

overview.label: Essence
overview.value: Right order, journey, rhythm of the road

items.label: Essence
items.value: Right order, journey, rhythm of the road

related.name: ♃ Jupiter
related.teaser: Jupiter is the thunder scepter — wheel of fate, king of sky, expansion of spirit.

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: Zeus
related.teaser: Zeus embodies sky, thunder, sovereignty — under Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: X. Wheel of Fortune
related.teaser: The Wheel turns eternal — fortune rising and falling, hub of cosmic cycles.

related.name: Mokosh
related.teaser: Mokosh embodies creation, cosmic order — under Sun · Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.
